aeo_readiness.summary: Omazing Air has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical areas for improvement. The website has schema markup implemented, but there are gaps in content optimization and local SEO presence.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in Gilbert, Arizona.
Enhance the website's metadata and headings to improve search engine visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete business information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized, with no reviews and incomplete business details, which limits local search visibility.
critical_issues: Incomplete business information (e.g., missing business hours, photos).

nap_citations.summary: The business has some NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency across the web, but there is room for improvement in citation quality and quantity.
action_items: Audit and update NAP citations across major directories and platforms to ensure consistency.
Claim and optimize listings on relevant local business directories.
Monitor and respond to any existing citations to improve local search presence.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Gilbert, Arizona due to low local SEO presence.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing GBP.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and earning backlinks from local organizations or industry websites.
